"'''The Art of ''Revenge of the Sith'''''" was a 3-part supplement series to ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith]]'' that was featured in ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' [[Star Wars Insider 83|83]], [[Star Wars Insider 84|84]], and [[Star Wars Insider 85|85]]. It was written by [[Jonathan W. Rinzler]] (the author of the book) and showcased various works of art that did not make it into the final cut of book itself.

==Contents==

===The Art of Revenge of the Sith, Part One===
[[File:FullFaie-TCWBRBD1.png|thumb|130px|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Faie/Legends|Faie]] in [[Clone cold assault trooper/Legends|clone cold assault trooper]] armor]]

*Planet Concept, Version 01 ''(by [[Erik Tiemens]])''
*Ice-Planet Concept Thumbnails ''(by Erik Tiemens)''
*Floating Buildings Environment ''(by [[Ryan Church]])''
*[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé]] Costume Concept 12 ''(by [[Sang Jun Lee]])''
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] Cruiser: Wartime Mode ''(by Ryan Church)''
*[[Lurmen/Legends|Lemur]] Concept 19 ''(by Sang Jun Lee)''
*[[Mygeeto/Legends|Crystal Planet]] Junk Barge ''(by [[T.J. Frame]])''
*[[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] Arrival (Storyboard Concept) ''(by [[Derek Thompson]])''
*Mustafar 01 ''(by [[Feng Zhu]])''

===The Art of Revenge of the Sith, Part Two===
''Along with Episode III concepts, Part 2 included Star Wars related drawings by some of the artists when they were children.''
*Mygeeto Surrender ''(by Ryan Church)''
*[[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]] Concept 02 ''(by [[Iain McCaig]])''
*Storyboards for December 6, [[2002]] ''(by Ryan Church, [[Stian Dahlslett]], T.J. Frame, [[Warren Fu]], [[Alex Jaeger]], Sang Jun Lee, Iain McCaig, Erik Tiemens, Derek Thompson, and Feng Zhu)''

[[File:WookieeJediConcept-Insider84.jpg|thumb|130px|Concept of a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] by [[Derek Thompson]].]]

*[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Concept ''(by Derek Thompson)''
*[[Polis Massa/Legends|Polis Massa]] Revision 01 ''(by Erik Tiemens)''
*Polis Massa Revision 08 ''(by Erik Tiemens)''
*[[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] ''(drawing by a young Alex Jaeger)''
*[[Grievous/Legends|Droid General]] Face Concept 05 (by Alex Jaeger)
*[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Cloning/Legends|Clone]]-Fighter Concepts ''(by T.J. Frame, Warren Fu, and Ryan Church)''
*Battle of Hoth ''(drawing by a young Warren Fu)''
*Clone Fighter, Revised ''(by Warren Fu)''
*Jellyfish Creature, Felucia ''(by Sang Jun Lee)'' '''Stamped FABULOUSO by [[George Lucas]]'''

===The Art of Revenge of the Sith, Part Three===
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] Construction ''(by Warren Fu)''
*Grievous/[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan]] Face-off ''(by Derek Thompson)''
*Sad [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]] ''(by Sang Jun Lee)''
*[[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Utapau Battle]], Street Close-up ''(by Ryan Church)''
*Barge (For Padmé's Funeral) ''(by Iain McCaig)''
*[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' Father ''(by Sang Jun Lee)''

[[File:BobasRevengeROTSART.jpg|thumb|200px|Rejected idea of [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] death.]]

*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] Revenge: The Death of [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] ''(by Warren Fu)''
*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] Cruiser Throne Room Key (Diorama) ''(by T.J. Frame)''
*[[Boga/Legends|Lizard]] Saddle (Keeping Obi-Wan In His Seat) ''(by Iain McCaig)''
*Form Study ([[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]) ''(by Erik Tiemens)''
*[[Nos monster/Legends|Grotto Monster]] ''(by [[Michael Murnane]])''
